title: Golden Globe Odds: Predictions for Best Director
text: This article covers predictions for the Golden Globe Award for Best Director, featuring analysis of nominees and odds. Paul Thomas Anderson is nominated for 'One Battle After Another,' featuring Leonardo DiCaprio and Sean Penn, with the film receiving '94% positive reviews on Rotten Tomatoes,' positioning it among his strongest works. Chloé Zhao is nominated for her adaptation of 'Hamnet,' a Shakespeare-inspired drama. Ryan Coogler received a nomination for 'Sinners,' a vampire-historical drama hybrid starring Michael B. Jordan. The article indicates Coogler 'seemed like an early favorite' but has since 'fallen behind' in the odds race.
